entries.content: preposition ① (lower than, underneath) 在…下方 zài… xiàfāng▸ beneath the table 在桌子底下 ② (concealed by) 在…的掩盖下 zài… de yǎngài xia▸ he hid his disappointment beneath a polite smile 他礼貌地微笑着以掩饰失望
entries.label: A
entries.name: preposition

entries.content: adverb ① (lower down, underneath) 在下面 zài xiàmian▸ the valley/river beneath 下面的山谷/河流 ② (concealed) 掩藏着 yǎncángzhe▸ the smile revealed the evil beneath 微笑中透出内心的邪恶
entries.label: B
entries.name: adverb
